title: Correctional staffing levels and inmate injury/death records (2023–2025)

communications.subject: Pennsylvania Right to Know Act Request: Correctional staffing levels and inmate injury/death records (2023–2025)
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Pennsylvania Right to Know Act, I hereby request the following records:

1. Records showing the number of correctional officers and staff assigned to the facility, broken down by month, for the years 2023, 2024, and 2025.

2. Any policies, guidelines, or official documents related to staffing levels, staffing requirements, or staffing procedures at the facility during 2023, 2024, and 2025.

3. Records showing the number of inmate injuries and/or deaths, broken down by year, for 2023, 2024, and 2025.

If possible, I request that these records be provided in electronic format.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
Anna Emelie Mari Beckman
1703 W Montgomery Avenue,
Philadelphia, PA  19121
United States

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Anna Emelie Mari Beckman
